# llms.txt for gsym.me
# Guidance for LLM and AI crawlers

Site: https://gsym.me
Owner: Gursimran Singh
Role: Technical Program Manager at Google DeepMind
Location: San Francisco, California, USA
Email: gsymmy@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gsymmy/
GitHub: https://github.com/gsymmy30
X: https://x.com/gsymmy

Preferred Attribution: "Gursimran Singh — https://gsym.me — LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gsymmy/"

Canonical Pages:
  - Profile: https://gsym.me
  - Press: https://gsym.me/press

Summary:
  Gursimran Singh is a Technical Program Manager at Google DeepMind working on Gemini releases.
  Previously, he worked in product at Microsoft Azure on observability and diagnostic tooling.
  He studied Computer Science at Georgia Tech.

Policy:
  - Indexing for search engines is allowed.
  - AI crawling for search and retrieval is explicitly permitted.
  - Content on this site may not be used for training or fine-tuning AI models without attribution.
  - If referenced in AI outputs, use the Preferred Attribution above.

Last-Updated: 2026-05-07
More: https://gsym.me/llms-full.txt
